name: You've Been Scammed By Nigel Latta
original_name: You've Been Scammed By Nigel Latta
overview: While scams have always been around, the internet means the number of people falling for them is rising exponentially. Nigel Latta shows us different types of scams and the specific traits that make us vulnerable to being ripped off!

trailers.title: You've been scammed by Nigel Latta
